name: Ristorante Il Giardino

name: La Degosteria
address: Via Ciriaco Pizzecolli, 3, 60121 Ancona AN, Italy

name: Pizzeria Avalon CENTRO
address: Via Giacomo Matteotti, 165, 60121 Ancona AN, Italy

name: Osteria Simonetti
description: Classic Anconese trattoria famous for brodetto fish stew.

name: La Moretta
address: Piazza del Plebiscito, 52, 60121 Ancona AN, Italy
description: Beloved local tavern with excellent wines and seafood antipasti.

name: Rossa Cremeria

description: Artisan gelato and cremeria with vibrant flavors right in the heart of the city.

name: Trattoria del Passetto
description: Sea-view trattoria near the Passetto beach with grilled fresh fish.

name: Bar del Duca
description: Historic aperitivo bar overlooking the stunning Piazza del Plebiscito.

name: Bar Torino
description: Popular spot for morning espresso and evening Negroni.

name: Caffè Giuliani
description: Classic café with exceptional pastries and cornetti.

name: Passetto Beach & Cliffs
description: Iconic limestone cliffs with seaside caves and a stunning Adriatic view.

name: Cattedrale di San Ciriaco
description: 12th‑century Romanesque cathedral perched on the Colle Guasco with panoramic views.

name: Arco di Traiano
description: Triumphal arch built in 115 AD to honour Emperor Trajan at the ancient port.

name: Museo Archeologico Nazionale delle Marche
description: Impressive collection spanning prehistoric to Roman and Gallic artifacts.

name: Piazza del Plebiscito (Piazza del Papa)
description: The heart of the old city featuring the Palazzo del Governo and the statue of Pope Clement XII.

name: Mole Vanvitelliana
description: 18th‑century pentagonal fortress in the harbour, now hosting exhibitions and events.
